title: TAL Hearing: Army Munition Industrial Base Modernization
description:
Purpose:
The committee will meet to receive testimony from senior officials from the Department of Defense and Department of the Army regarding the current state of the Army munition industrial base and possible paths forward for modernization.
text:
Purpose: The committee will meet to receive testimony from senior officials from the Department of Defense and Department of the Army regarding the current state of the Army munition industrial base and possible paths forward for modernization.
Opening Statement
Witnesses:
Mr. Steven J. Morani
Performing the Duties of Under Secretary of Defense for Acquisition and Sustainment
U.S. Department of Defense
Mr. Chris Grassano
Director, DEVCOM Armaments Center
U.S. Army
Major General John T. Reim, USA
Joint Program Executive Office Armaments & Ammunition and the Commanding General, Picatinny Arsenal
U.S. Army
Brigadier General Daniel Duncan, USA
Commanding General, Joint Munitions Command
U.S. Army
